description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat, dark brown roof and a clean, rectangular design. The exterior walls are primarily white with wooden accents, and large glass windows provide ample natural light to the interior. The property is surrounded by a green hedge fence and features a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, patio seating, and landscaped garden areas. The front of the house includes a driveway leading to a wooden garage and a small entry porch with steps and potted plants. The landscaping includes several trees, flower beds, and a well-maintained lawn. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, with an emphasis on open outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, and wooden accents, surrounded by a hedge fence and featuring a backyard pool and landscaped garden.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the backyard with a swimming pool, patio, outdoor seating, and lush landscaping.
description_view_1: Side/front view highlighting the main entryway, garage, driveway, and front garden with potted plants.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the garage, driveway, main entrance, and a partial view of the backyard amenities.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the backyard patio, pool, and additional garden features.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, small porch with steps, potted plants, and minimal decorative elements
